# Neo-Brutalism Design Principles

Neo-brutalism favors raw contrast, heavy edges, and loud color.

## Core Concepts
- Thick black borders (`border-2` to `border-4`, `border-black`)
- Hard offset shadows (no blur)
- High-saturation accent blocks
- Bold, oversized typography

## Tailwind Example
```html
<div class="bg-yellow-400 border-4 border-black p-6 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]">
  <h2 class="text-3xl font-black uppercase mb-4">Brutal Impact</h2>
  <p class="text-lg font-bold">Raw energy and high visibility.</p>
</div>
```

## Usage Guidance
- Keep hierarchy clear even with loud visuals
- Pair strong visual style with strong accessibility states
